meaning: n.都市生活,都市社会物质需求的研究,都市化
examples: These findings do not imply that urbanism makes little or no difference.
Urbanism may produce a different style of life, but the quality of life does not differ between town and city.
This subject engages a dialogue with architecture and urbanism from the perspective of the visual artist.
The result has been a thriving strip of urbanism in an otherwise-suburban part of town.
Yet if you want to see successful 21st-century urbanism, hop on down to Houston and Texas, the Lone Star State.
